channel.title: MBallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MBallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why You Should Probably Be More Prejudiced
item.description: Prejudice is an inescapable concept. We all have prejudices. The question is, are they the right ones?

item.title: Talarico wins Texas Senate Democratic nomination while Cornyn and Paxton head to Republican runoff
item.description: State Rep. James Talarico topped Congresswoman Jasmine Crockett in an expensive and fiercely contested Texas Senate Democratic primary that once again...

item.title: Democrat Bill Would Flood Every School, Church, And Hospital With Illegal Squatters
item.description: Union bosses support this reckless policy because they are more concerned with politics than with protecting teachers and students.

item.title: GOP challenger Steve Toth ousts Rep. Dan Crenshaw in Texas primary
item.description: Republican challenger Steve Toth defeated U.S. Rep. Dan Crenshaw on Tuesday night, ousting the only House Republican in Texas who President Trump didn...

item.title: Ex-RNC chairman Whatley to face former Democrat Gov. Cooper in North Carolina Senate race
item.description: North Carolina primary voters on Tuesday set up a high-stakes match in November that will help decide which party controls the Senate.

item.title: Top Democrats say 25-year-old AUMF won't cover Iran strike
item.description: Top Democrats argued Tuesday against applying a 25-year-old AUMF on the strikes against Iran while simultaneously suggesting the U.S. has been at war ...

item.title: 14 Pro-Life Alternatives To IVF For Infertile Couples Who Desire Children
item.description: As couples increasingly question IVF ethics, they are seeking better options. Here are 14 to consider.

item.title: A Victory for Parental Common Sense over School Grooming Gag Rules
item.description: The Supreme Court strikes another blow for parents and against gender madness.

item.title: The Hurdles to Democracy in Iran
item.description: And how to potentially overcome them.

item.title: California’s Dying Bullet Train Is A Preview Of A Newsom Presidency
item.description: California's high-speed rail project, approved in 2008 and under construction since 2015, is running out of money and time, while failing.

item.title: The Border Tax Is Back, and It’s Still a Terrible Idea
item.description: The BAT is a gamble with America’s economic future, and it’s not a gamble worth taking.

item.title: Michigan’s Dirty And Dead-Ridden Voter Rolls Escape Scrutiny
item.description: The Supreme Court this week passed on a watchdog's request to review lower court decisions finding Michigan's voter list clean enough.

item.title: Cornyn, Paxton advance to runoff in Texas Republican primary for U.S. Senate
item.description: Longtime Sen. John Cornyn and MAGA favorite Ken Paxton are heading to a May runoff in Texas' Republican Senate primary, while Congresswoman Jasmine Cr...

item.title: Why Operation Epic Fury Is Catastrophic for Xi
item.description: The U.S.–Israeli military campaign has created palpable problems for China.

item.title: Ella McCay — Hollywood’s Definitive Disaster
item.description: James L. Brooks loses his sense of humor to politics.
